definition: statement indicating the state of being free or freed from a charge or obligation to which others are subject

definition_ml.en: statement indicating the state of being free or freed from a charge or obligation to which others are subject

note: EXAMPLE Exemptions to RoHS are granted to narrowly-defined applications for which the elimination of the prohibited substance is technically or scientifically impracticable or when the only available substitution produces more negative than positive benefits to the environment, health, or consumer safety.

note_ml.en: EXAMPLE Exemptions to RoHS are granted to narrowly-defined applications for which the elimination of the prohibited substance is technically or scientifically impracticable or when the only available substitution produces more negative than positive benefits to the environment, health, or consumer safety.
